name: George Shearing
abstract: Sir George Albert Shearing (13 August 1919 – 14 February 2011) was a British jazz pianist and composer who for many years led a popular jazz group that recorded for Discovery Records, MGM Records and Capitol Records. Shearing was the composer of over 300 songs, including the jazz standards "Lullaby of Birdland" and "Conception", and had …

about_quotes.speaker: John Levy
about_quotes.evidence: I ended up with George Shearing as the bass player in a permanent position... that was the beginning of the George Shearing Quintet... which was Denzel Best, Margie Hyams, Chuck Wayne, George Shearing and myself.
about_quotes.doc_title: John Levy interviewed by Monk Rowe, Majesty of the Seas, May 31, 1995

about_quotes.speaker: Ted Piltzecker
about_quotes.evidence: So I’m in the quintet and we used to play... George would be playing this lock hand position and the vibraphone and guitar had to play absolute unison with that
about_quotes.doc_title: Ted Piltzecker interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, October 10, 2019

about_quotes.speaker: Gary Burton
about_quotes.evidence: I was 19 when I joined my first name band, George Shearing... I ended up with George finally, come January... The year with George was a terrific education.
about_quotes.doc_title: Gary Burton — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Hal Galper
about_quotes.evidence: I said, 'you’re the cause I’m here today' you know because your record was the first record, jazz record I ever heard.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hal Galper interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 27, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Ed Shaughnessy Part I
about_quotes.evidence: George Shearing gave me my first job in New York when I was about eighteen... So he gave me two nights.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ed Shaughnessy Part I interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, September 1, 1995 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: DeFranco Buddy
about_quotes.evidence: George Shearing and I, and John Levy, Denzil Best; we had a quartet at a club called the Clique.
about_quotes.doc_title: DeFranco Buddy — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
